title: Johnstone's One Coat Matt Emulsion Paint - Manhattan Grey , 2.5L , 389522
description: From the manufacturer Johnstone's One Coat Paint If you're short on time and need a room makeover, Johnstone's One Coat paint is the perfect solution. Its fast drying and low odour qualities allow you to achieve a new look quickly with no hassle. Fast drying Self undercoating Low odour Key Features 8m² per litre Touch dry in 1-2 hours Wipeable Water based Matt Finish Time Saving Johnstone's One Coat Matt Emulsion has been designed to give superb covering power with the convenience of a single coat. The advanced formula is also quick drying and low odour making it the perfect product where a fast turnaround is required. Preparation Checklist Masking Tape Sandpaper Synthetic Paint Brushes Medium Pile Roller and tray Filler and Filling Knife Preparation Tips Protect your furniture by covering with a dust sheet Wipe down walls so your surface is clean and free from grease Sand walls to create a smooth, even finish Apply masking tape to any edges to create neat, clean lines Wild Instinct allows you to experiment with bolder colours all around your home. Don’t be afraid to introduce pops of colour or creative designs, even in smaller spaces to create impact. Artisan Heritage is perfect for any space that you want to inject some sophisticated creativity. It works well for inviting social spaces within kitchens, dining and living areas. The shades can be used to create an inspiring space in a home office or reading nook, or in a bedroom to create an authentic feeling of luxury. Soothing Solace works well in relaxing spaces of the home such as living rooms and bedrooms, thanks to its soothing vibes and neutral shades. It can also be used to bring a sense of calm to busier kitchens and dining rooms.
